CHAIR: This special session reviews the FCC inquiry on 6 GHz interference.
ALICE: Item 1: petition response timeline.
BOB: The FCC noted the petition for reconsideration and assigned it to docket 24-101.
ALICE: The commission directed staff to prepare a technical analysis within thirty days.
CHAIR: Item 2: coordination updates.
ALICE: Erin will compile the comment summary by next Tuesday.
BOB: Frank notifies the licensees once the docket opens.
CHAIR: Should incumbents receive advance notice before the comment window opens?
ALICE: The chair mentioned a possible workshop in the spring.
